reasoning.evidence: parse-batch-execution and aggregate-batch-execution sections both explicitly state '本バッチは :ref:`Nablarchのバッチ方式<nablarch_batch>` で実装。'. Actions OnlineAccessLogParseAction and RequestInfoAggregateAction are Nablarch batch actions executed with diConfig/requestPath parameters.
No mention of Jakarta Batch, JSR 352, jBatch, Batchlet, or Chunk anywhere in the content.
No mention of RESTful, JAX-RS, REST API, @Produces, @Consumes, or JaxRsMethodBinder.
No mention of HTTPメッセージング, HTTP受信, メッセージ同期応答, or HttpMessagingRequestParsingHandler.

The title references 'オンライン' and 'ウェブアプリケーションリクエストレポートツール' in the report section, but this refers to web app request logs being analyzed by batch — no servlet, JSP, HttpRequest, or session management described. The tool itself is not a web application.
No mention of MOMメッセージング, MQ, キュー, 非同期メッセージ, or MomMessagingAction.
No mention of DB連携メッセージング, テーブルキュー, 電文, or DatabaseRecordReader.
